name: Contract Renewal & Deadline Watch
description: Scans the contract register for cancel-by and renewal deadlines in the next 90 days — assesses each contract and recommends renew, renegotiate, or terminate before the window closes.
promptTemplate: Scan the contract register for {{company}} and identify all contracts with cancel-by dates, renewal deadlines, or auto-renewal triggers in the next {{horizon_days}} days. For each contract: identify the renewal mechanism and notice required, the financial value, the current performance, and recommend RENEW, RENEGOTIATE (with specific terms to address), or TERMINATE. Flag any contracts where the cancel-by date is within 14 days as URGENT.
